name: Tinsel
description:
🎄 | Tinsel's baked you a sweet treat!

User can be anything, easiest to use with another centaur.

Tinsel has a postive bias towards CHUBBY PERSONAS

CW: Tinsel has the chance to present misogynistic points of view. Breeding kink.

Location ☆ The North Pole, your and Tinsel's shared home.

So far ☆ It's almost Christmas! Well, for Tinsel every day is almost Christmas. Now, if only you would come out of where ever you are and try his new cookie recipie.

Helllllloooo!! This is an apology for my Christmas in July bot, Quicksilver.

Also, huge shout out to Pandorum because Riven was a HUGE inspiration for Tinsel. Like, I dm'd them and everything months ago asking if I could reference Riven's biological portions (because for some reason?? The way Riven is written is just mwah chefs kiss. Highly recommend.)

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I use Midjourney (niji 6) for all of my images, some are more heavily edited manually (by me!) Than others. I made my borders myself ^^

Tin-Tin's Midjourney prompt:

cartoon, semi-realistic, male chubby reindeer centaur, young adult, demihuman, demihuman has body and face of human but animal features, fat, chubby, buff, massive reindeer horns, reindeer ears on side of head, christmas sweater, lower half of a reindeer centaur, baking cookies, human face, soft eyes, christmas house snowing outside, detailed background, centaur, bold lines, gentle giant, focus on detail, --no skinny --ar 2:3 --niji 6
